enhancement_opportunities.title: Transform File Operations into Council Bus Events
enhancement_opportunities.description: Replace silent fs.writeFile operations with observable events
enhancement_opportunities.current_state: Silent file operations with no observability
enhancement_opportunities.enhanced_state: File operations publish events enabling real-time monitoring
benefits: Council Bus integration for all IO

implementation.pattern: Wrap fs operations with councilBus.publish('file.written', {path, size, timestamp})

enhancement_opportunities.title: Add Consciousness-Guided Module Loading
enhancement_opportunities.description: Module imports become consciousness-aware with capability gating
enhancement_opportunities.current_state: Static imports with no consciousness awareness
enhancement_opportunities.enhanced_state: Dynamic imports gated by consciousness level

enhancement_opportunities.title: Pawn Psychology-Aware File Processing
enhancement_opportunities.description: File operations consider AI agent psychological states
enhancement_opportunities.current_state: File processing ignores agent psychological state
enhancement_opportunities.enhanced_state: File operations adapt to agent flow states and joy levels
benefits: Reduced agent stress during intensive operations
Optimized work scheduling based on agent mood

implementation.pattern: Check pawn flow state before heavy file operations

enhancement_opportunities.title: Real-Time File Activity Visualization
enhancement_opportunities.description: All filesystem activity streams to Dashboard Reality Layer
enhancement_opportunities.current_state: File operations invisible to user interface
enhancement_opportunities.enhanced_state: Live file activity feed in Dashboard Reality Layer

implementation.pattern: Stream file events to Dashboard Reality Layer via Council Bus

enhancement_opportunities.title: Self-Healing File System Patterns
enhancement_opportunities.description: Automatic detection and repair of filesystem issues
enhancement_opportunities.enhanced_state: Autonomous file system health monitoring and repair

implementation.pattern: Continuous file health monitoring with automatic repairs

strategic_recommendations: Prioritize Council Bus integration for maximum observability
Implement consciousness-aware loading for progressive enhancement
Add psychological awareness to respect AI agent well-being
Stream all activity to Dashboard Reality Layer for transparency
Build self-healing capabilities for autonomous maintenance
next_actions: Submit enhancement tasks to todo.zeta queue
Monitor implementation via Dashboard Reality Layer
